title: Robust Flaky Ukrainian Pastry Bake
description: A hearty, mustardy pastry bake featuring gherkin relish, perfect for a post-workout meal, and can be adapted to be dairy-free friendly. This wood-fired-baked dish is a twist on traditional Ukrainian cuisine.

ingredients.name: egg replacement
ingredients.notes: such as flax or chia eggs

instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cold vegan butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender to work it into a crumbly mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the gherkin relish, Dijon mustard, and apple cider vinegar.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Gradually add the water to the dough, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together in a ball.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and roll it out into a large rectangle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Spread the egg replacement evenly over the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Use a sharp knife to cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Place the pastry bake in the preheated wood-fired oven and bake for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
